title: Rich Tender Russian Almond Stir-fry
description: A rich and tender dish featuring ground almonds that is both a show-off culinary masterpiece and a kosher-friendly meal.
instructions: Spread the blanched almonds evenly on a baking sheet. Roast them for about 10 minutes until golden brown and slightly crispy.
In a large skillet, melt butter over medium heat. Add prosciutto slices and garlic cloves, stirring occasionally until prosciutto starts to crisp up, about 3-5 minutes.
Reduce the heat to low, add roasted almonds and lemon juice into the pan. Stir gently for another minute or so until flavors are well combined.
Gradually pour in heavy cream while continuously mixing with a wooden spoon. Let it simmer over medium-low heat until sauce thickens, approximately 3-5 minutes.
Season your dish with salt and pepper to taste. If desired, garnish with fresh chopped parsley before serving.
